title: Create subscription with trial period
description: Learn how to create a subscription with a trial period using Stripe Checkout.

nodes.title: Create Checkout Session
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API and reuses any IDs needed by later steps.
nodes.review_risk: A wrong API call or stale Stripe ID can make later steps work against the wrong resource.

nodes.title: Complete checkout
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.
nodes.review_risk: A UI mismatch can make a working backend unreachable or send users through the wrong flow.

nodes.title: Wait for checkout.session.completed event
nodes.review_prompt: Run stripe trigger checkout.session.completed and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.
nodes.review_risk: Webhook mistakes can fulfill work from spoofed or unhandled events.

nodes.title: Wait for customer.subscription.created event
nodes.review_prompt: Run stripe trigger customer.subscription.created and confirm the handler processes the signed event correctly.
nodes.review_risk: Webhook mistakes can fulfill work from spoofed or unhandled events.
